description: Create a Sternberg Memory Scanning experiment in PsychoPy Builder. Generate a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sternberg_conditions.csv with columns for set_size, memory_set, probe, present, and correct_key for at least 12 trials using set sizes of 1, 3, and 5 digits. Ensure the 'present' column ('y'/'n') correctly indicates if the probe is in the memory set, mapping 'left' to present and 'right' to absent. Build the experiment at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sternberg_task.psyexp including routines for Instructions, Fixation, Presentation, Delay, Probe, and Feedback, with a trial loop connected to the conditions file.
